ops.title: ALL codex exec calls fail on the ChatGPT usage limit until 2026-07-24 ~20:25 — route sol lanes to opus xhigh / fable until then
ops.body:
On 2026-07-18 the ChatGPT account behind the codex CLI hit its usage limit: every `codex exec` turn fails immediately with `turn.failed` ("You've hit your usage limit... try again at Jul 24th, 2026 8:25 PM"). This is account-wide — it kills sol AND luna lanes, implementation, review, and recon alike.

**Why:** the Models-table gpt-5.6 lanes (implementation, diff review, security verification, recon-at-xhigh) all ride the same account; a lane dispatched there fails fast with no work done, so any "codex failed" report during this window is this outage, not a task problem.

**How to apply:** until the reset (2026-07-24 ~20:25), route sol implementation lanes to opus xhigh and review/verification to opus xhigh or fable (verification at same-or-higher tier than the work); route luna recon to sonnet. Do not re-dispatch to codex before the reset, and do not diagnose fast-failing codex lanes as prompt or repo issues. Delete this memory after the reset once a codex smoke call succeeds. See [[codex-security-review-content-filter]] for the separate (still valid) cyber-filter constraint.
